name: key-hints
title: Key hints
description: Compact footer of key-and-description pairs separated by a thin divider. The bottom-row cheatsheet every TUI grows into; build it as a primitive so it's not rewritten in every parent model.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Pure render. Build a []keyhints.Hint{{Key, Desc}, ...} from your model's current binding set; the bar lays it out left-to-right and clamps to WithWidth.
